title: neanotis indica var. deltoidea
intro: Neanotis indica var. deltoidea, also known as the Indian snakeweed, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, native to the Himalayan region and parts of India. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. Neanotis indica var. deltoidea has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, offering benefits such as pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function. The plant is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and its herbal preparations are used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
